description: Composition Blue and white plaid check shirt with navy blue accents made of 100% cotton with a washed effect, that has short sleeves with buttoned flaps on the cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, brand details printed on the upper left pocket and curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this check shirt from belmonte. The washed effect of the shirt and patch pockets gives a laid back look, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or khakhis and leather slip-on shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
